name: Longevous Disciple
description: Increases Max HP by 12%. When the wearer is hit or has their HP consumed by an ally or themselves, their CRIT Rate increases by 8% for 2 turns and up to 2 stacks.

pieces4.description: When the wearer is hit or has their HP consumed by an ally or themselves, their CRIT Rate increases by 8% for 2 turns and up to 2 stacks.
